_note: A reactive RE-assignment `$: value = normalize(value)` whose RHS forward-references a later declaration (`const normalize` below) must type-check clean. Emitting the bare `value = normalize(value);` fires TS2448 (used before declaration). Wrap the RHS in the invalidate thunk — `value = __svn_invalidate(() => (normalize(value)));` — so TS flow analysis is lazy, mirroring upstream `$: NAME = __sveltets_2_invalidate(() => EXPR)`. Found by the upstream audit.
